title: The Second Ancestral Race
wikitext:
[]: The Second Ancestral Race             Quote Post by Lavinius » Sat Apr 26, 2014 10:26 pm I remember finding this document linked to on the wiki, a very long compendium of sources on Eva's production. At the earliest stages there was some sort of description of an early backstory scenario, in which the First Ancestral Race created the Evangelions to obtain godhood, but were destroyed by them, and later the Second Ancestral Race built the Angels and the Lance of Longinus in order to destroy Eva in case they were ever recreated. I can't find this document anymore though. Does anyone know where it is? Moreover, does the continued usage of " First Ancestral Race" into the Eva 2 game imply that in the final, true Eva there is still supposed to be a Second Ancestral Race of some kind? At this time is it referring to the Seeds of Life, perhaps? Edit: I found an old thread with a reference to this material.

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Sat Apr 26, 2014 11:13 pm I thought it was just a quirk of the Japanese terminology, considering that the version of the backstory that included the Second Ancestral Race was apparently rejected. Alternatively, you can argue that humanity, by synthesizing Adam- and Lilith-based lifeforms into one organism, has become the Second Ancestral Race at the end of the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Apr 27, 2014 9:01 am Nah. At that time, th plot still looked very different (and partially more Nadiaesque, with precursors more involved with the earth who even left a city behind), I doubt any of this was ultimately relevant to the finished product - The Name "first ancestral race" is probably a holdover - and still accurate without there being a need for a second one, it just references that they were the first and only life in the perimeter acessible to them, possibly the whole universe/galaxy.

[]:             Quote Post by El Squibbonator » Mon May 12, 2014 2:48 pm The meaning of word "first" is pretty obvious, even without the need for a second--they were the FIRST race that was ANCESTRAL to all others in the galaxy/universe/multiverse.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 12, 2014 4:25 pm Yes, but a longer terms just sounds cooler.

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Mon May 12, 2014 8:06 pm El Squibbonator wrote: The meaning of word "first" is pretty obvious, even without the need for a second--they were the FIRST race that was ANCESTRAL to all others in the galaxy/universe/multiverse.

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon May 12, 2014 8:12 pm Which I suggested that the Seven Seeds could be the current reference from the Second Ancestral Race.

I can't find this document anymore though. Does anyone know where it is? Moreover, does the continued usage of " First Ancestral Race" into the Eva 2 game imply that in the final, true Eva there is still supposed to be a Second Ancestral Race of some kind? At this time is it referring to the Seeds of Life, perhaps? Edit: I found an old thread with a reference to this material.

Alternatively, you can argue that humanity, by synthesizing Adam- and Lilith-based lifeforms into one organism, has become the Second Ancestral Race at the end of the series.
